info.title: test-rerun
info.description: wrapper of dotnet test command with the extra option to automatic rerun failed tests

options.name: --filter
options.description: Run tests that match the given expression.

options.name: --settings
options.description: The run settings file to use when running tests.

options.name: --logger
options.description: Specifies a logger for test results. [default: trx]

options.name: --results-directory
options.description:
The directory where the test results will be placed.
The specified directory will be created if it does not exist. [default: .]

options.name: --rerunMaxAttempts
options.description: Maximum # of attempts. [default: 3]

options.name: --rerunMaxFailedTests
options.description: Maximum # of failed tests to rerun. If exceeded, tests will not be rerun. [default: -1]

options.name: --loglevel
options.description: Log Level [default: Verbose]

options.name: --no-build
options.description: Do not build the project before testing. Implies --no-restore.

options.name: --no-restore
options.description: Do not restore the project before building.

options.name: --delay
options.description: Delay between test runs in seconds.

options.name: --blame
options.description: Runs the tests in blame mode.

options.name: --configuration
options.description: Defines the build configuration.

options.name: --framework
options.description: Defines the target framework to run the tests.

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Sets the verbosity level of the command. Possible values: Quiet, Minimal, Normal, Detailed, Diagnostic

options.name: --deleteReports
options.description: Delete the report files generated.

options.name: --collect
options.description: Enables data collector for the test run.

options.name: --mergeCoverageFormat
options.description: Output coverage format. Note: requires dotnet coverage tool to be installed.

options.name: --inlineRunSettings
options.description: Specifies the inline run settings.

options.name: --environment
options.description: Sets the value of an environment variable.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

arguments.name: PATH
arguments.description:
Path to a test project .dll file.
Arguments passed to the application that is being run.
